title: JokingOverlay
description: A texture pack for both PvP combat and Survival, mainly contains textures and models.
body:
Check the showcase video: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/P-zZNhVxgro" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**The pack contains:**


- Low Shield
- Low Fire
- Custom Small Totem/Pop Model
- Wider Sword Models (including copper sword)
- Decreased Particles
- Small Utilities
- Small Mace Model
- Re-textured Potions
- 1.19.3 "Old" Enchantment Glint
